auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the marketplace.
auth.error_credentials: Please enter your email/username and password.
auth.error_verify_email: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.error_profile_init: Could not initialize your account profile.
auth.resend_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.resend_hint: Didn't get the email? Check spam, then resend to {email}.

auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your university email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.check_email_subtitle: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth.check_email_spam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
orders.hub_subtitle: Track purchases, sales, meetups, and reviews in one place.
orders.how_it_works_title: How orders and chat deals work
orders.how_it_works_body: Messaging a seller can create a pending order here with meetup details. When you finish the sale in chat, both of you confirm the deal — the seller's confirmation marks the item sold and completes the linked order.
orders.empty_purchases: You haven't placed any orders yet.
orders.empty_sales: You don't have any sales yet.
orders.admin_redirect: Administrators do not have personal orders. Use the Admin Panel to view all orders.
orders.flash_confirmed: Order confirmed and product marked as sold.
place_order.title: Complete Your Order
place_order.error_duplicate: You already have a pending order for this item.
place_order.success: Order placed! The seller has been notified.
chat.orders_deal_explainer: After you meet up, confirm the deal in this chat. My Orders tracks meetup details; chat confirmation marks the item sold.
admin.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access that page.
chat.translate_failed: Could not translate this message. Try again.
chat.translation_unavailable: Translation is not available right now.
report.title: Report an Issue
report.subtitle: Help us keep CampusMarket safe by reporting suspicious listings, abusive users, or technical problems.
report.description_placeholder: Please provide details about the issue...
report.success: Thank you for your report. Our moderation team has been notified and will review it shortly.
report.error_submit: There was an error submitting your report. Please try again later.
report.error_description_required: Please describe the issue before submitting.
report.error_rate_limit: You have submitted too many reports. Please try again in about {minutes} minutes.
report.error_duplicate: You already have a pending report for this item. Our team is reviewing it.
report.received_email_body: Thank you for helping keep CampusMarket safe. Our moderation team will review your report and you can track its status on your reports page.
report.my_reports_subtitle: Track reports you have submitted to the moderation team.
report.my_reports_empty: You have not submitted any reports yet.
auth.error_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
admin.flash_report_resolved: Report marked as resolved and reporter notified.
admin.flash_report_flagged: Listing flagged, hidden from marketplace, and parties notified.
admin.flash_report_warned: Warning sent to the user and reporter notified.
admin.report_invalid_action: That moderation action is not available for this report.
admin.report_cannot_target_self: You cannot moderate your own account.
admin.report_suspend_failed: Could not suspend that user (they may be an admin).
admin.report_resolve_all_in_group: Apply to all reports in this group
admin.report_sibling_resolved_body: A related report (#{id}) was reviewed by our team. Thank you for your help.
admin.report_confirm_flag: Flag this listing and hide it from the marketplace?
admin.report_confirm_suspend: Suspend this user? They will be logged out and unable to sign in.
admin.report_reporter_dismissed_body: We reviewed your report and did not take action at this time.
admin.report_reporter_resolved_body: Thank you for your report. Our team has reviewed it and taken appropriate action.
admin.report_reporter_flagged_body: Thank you for reporting this listing. We removed it from the marketplace.
admin.report_reporter_warned_body: Thank you for your report. We issued a warning to the reported user.
admin.report_reporter_suspended_body: Thank you for your report. We suspended the reported account.
admin.report_seller_flagged_body: Your listing "{title}" was flagged and hidden after a community report.
admin.report_warn_user_body: An administrator reviewed a report about your account. Please follow campus marketplace guidelines.
admin.report_suspend_user_body: Your account was suspended after a moderation review. Contact support to appeal.
admin.report_unsuspend_body: Your account suspension has been lifted. You can use CampusMarket again.
auth.register_terms_error: You must agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Community Rules.
auth.register_terms_agree: I agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Community Rules.
policy.terms.title: Terms of Service
policy.terms.intro: Welcome to CampusMarket. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy and Community Rules.
policy.terms.s1_body: CampusMarket is a campus marketplace that helps verified students and staff discover, list, and coordinate sales of used goods. We provide the platform; sales and meetups are between users. We do not take possession of items, ship goods, or guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of listings.
policy.terms.s2_body: You must register with a valid university email address from a supported campus domain (for example @ciu.edu.tr, @emu.edu.tr, or other approved .edu.tr addresses). You must provide accurate registration information and keep your account secure. One person per account.
policy.terms.s3_body: You are responsible for activity on your account. Do not share your password. Notify us at {support_email} if you suspect unauthorized access.
policy.terms.s4_body: You may create listings subject to our Community Rules. Listings may be reviewed automatically (including AI-assisted checks of title, description, and photos) and by administrators. We may approve, reject, remove, or place listings in pending approval at our discretion.
policy.terms.s5_body_1: Most trades between buyers and sellers happen directly (for example cash or peer-to-peer apps at a meetup). CampusMarket does not hold buyer funds for used-item sales.
policy.terms.s5_body_2: Stripe is used only for optional platform features such as listing promotions and donations. Stripe’s own terms apply when you complete those payments.
policy.terms.s6_body: You agree not to harass others, post prohibited items, commit fraud, or misuse the platform. See our Community Rules and Safety Guidelines. Violations may result in content removal or account suspension.
policy.terms.s7_body: You keep ownership of content you upload (photos, descriptions, messages). You grant CampusMarket a license to host, display, and moderate that content so we can operate the service (for example showing listings to other users and running safety checks).
policy.terms.s8_body: Users may report listings or accounts. We may investigate reports and take action including warnings, listing removal, or account suspension. See Report to submit a concern.
policy.terms.s9_body: We aim to keep CampusMarket available but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Features may change, and maintenance or outages may occur.
policy.terms.s10_body: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will update the “Last updated” date above. Continued use after changes means you accept the revised Terms.
policy.terms.legal_note: Note: Additional legal terms (such as governing law and formal liability provisions) are being prepared with legal counsel and will be published when finalized.
policy.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information CampusMarket collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. It applies when you use our website and related services.
policy.privacy.s1_li_account: Account data: university email, username, password (stored hashed), optional phone number and student ID, profile details (avatar, bio, language preference).
policy.privacy.s1_li_listing: Listing data: titles, descriptions, prices, photos, categories, tags, and listing status.
policy.privacy.s1_li_messages: Messages and orders: direct messages between users, order requests, and deal-related activity on the platform.
policy.privacy.s1_li_reports: Reports: content you submit when reporting a listing or user.
policy.privacy.s1_li_reviews: Reviews and ratings: feedback you leave after completed transactions.
policy.privacy.s1_li_notifications: Notifications: in-app notification history; optional browser push subscription data if you enable push alerts.
policy.privacy.s1_li_payment: Payment-related data: when you use Stripe for promotions or donations, Stripe processes payment details—we receive confirmation and metadata (not full card numbers).
policy.privacy.s1_li_technical: Technical data: cookies and similar technologies (see our Cookie Policy), server logs, and security-related data.
policy.privacy.s2_li_1: Create and secure your account (including email verification).
policy.privacy.s2_li_2: Display listings, profiles, and messages to other users as part of the service.
policy.privacy.s2_li_3: Facilitate buyer–seller communication and order coordination.
policy.privacy.s2_li_4: Moderate content for safety (see AI-assisted moderation below).
policy.privacy.s2_li_5: Send service emails (verification, password reset, important alerts) via our email provider.
policy.privacy.s2_li_6: Send optional push notifications if you opt in.
policy.privacy.s2_li_7: Improve reliability, prevent abuse, and enforce our rules.
policy.privacy.s3_body: When you submit a listing, we may send the title, description, and listing photos to automated moderation services (such as Google Gemini, with OpenRouter as a fallback when configured) to check for policy issues, blurry images, and obvious prohibited content. Listings that do not pass automated or human review may be held for pending approval or removed. Moderation results are used for platform safety, not for advertising profiles about you.
policy.privacy.s4_body: If you use the CampusMarket help chatbot, your messages may be processed by our chatbot service (hosted on Supabase Edge Functions) and sent to an AI provider to generate replies. Do not share passwords or sensitive personal data in the chatbot.
policy.privacy.s5_body: If you use in-chat translation, message text may be sent to a translation provider (such as Google Cloud Translation) to produce the translated version.
policy.privacy.s6_intro: We use trusted third parties to run CampusMarket. They process data on our behalf only as needed to provide the service:
policy.privacy.s6_li_supabase: Supabase — database, authentication, realtime features, and edge functions
policy.privacy.s6_li_google: Google — AI moderation, optional translation, and chatbot responses (when configured)
policy.privacy.s6_outro: We do not sell your personal information to third parties for their marketing.
policy.privacy.s7_body: Your public profile, active listings, and messages you send to other users are visible according to normal marketplace use. Other verified campus users can browse listings and contact sellers. Do not post information in listings or messages that you want to keep private.
policy.privacy.s8_body: We keep account and activity data while your account is active and for a reasonable period afterward so we can operate the service, resolve disputes, and meet operational needs. You may contact us to request account deletion; some records may be retained where required for security or legal compliance once formal retention policies are in place.
policy.privacy.s9_body: We use industry-standard measures such as encrypted connections (HTTPS), hashed passwords, and access controls. No online service is completely secure; please use a strong, unique password.
policy.privacy.s10_li_1: Update profile information in your account settings.
policy.privacy.s10_li_2: Disable browser push notifications in your device or browser settings.
policy.privacy.s10_li_3: Contact us to ask about access, correction, or deletion of your data.
policy.privacy.legal_note: Note: Formal data-protection disclosures (including jurisdiction-specific rights and legal bases) are being finalized with legal counsel and will be added when complete.
policy.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
policy.cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how CampusMarket uses cookies and similar technologies. See also our Privacy Policy.
policy.cookies.s1_body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your session, preferences, and security settings.
policy.cookies.row_csrf: Protects forms from cross-site request forgery attacks
policy.cookies.row_session: Keeps you signed in across requests
policy.cookies.row_php: Session identifier when server sessions are used (local dev)
policy.cookies.no_tracking: We do not use third-party advertising or social-media tracking cookies on the main marketplace experience.
policy.cookies.s3_body: If you install or use CampusMarket as a progressive web app (PWA), your browser may store offline assets, wishlist preferences, or similar data in local storage to improve performance. Push notification preferences are stored when you enable alerts.
policy.cookies.s4_body: When you pay for a listing promotion or donation through Stripe Checkout, Stripe may set its own cookies to process the payment securely. Those cookies are governed by Stripe’s privacy policy.
policy.cookies.s5_body: You can block or delete cookies in your browser settings. If you disable essential cookies, you may not be able to stay signed in or submit forms securely.
policy.rules.title: Community Rules
policy.rules.intro: These rules keep CampusMarket safe and fair for everyone. They work together with our Terms of Service and Safety Guidelines. Violations may lead to listing removal or account suspension.
policy.rules.s1_body: Treat all members with respect. Hate speech, bullying, harassment, threats, or discrimination are not allowed in listings, messages, or profiles.
policy.rules.s2_li_1: Use accurate titles and descriptions; disclose damage, missing parts, or defects.
policy.rules.s2_li_2: Upload clear photos that match the item you are selling.
policy.rules.s2_li_3: Price items fairly; do not use misleading “bait” listings.
policy.rules.s3_li_1: Weapons, ammunition, knives intended as weapons, or dangerous items
policy.rules.s3_li_2: Illegal drugs, controlled substances, or prescription medications
policy.rules.s3_li_5: Stolen goods, counterfeit items, or recalled products
policy.rules.s3_li_6: Academic dishonesty materials (exam papers, test banks, graded homework, etc.)
policy.rules.s3_li_7: Scams, phishing, or anything that violates university or local law
policy.rules.s3_outro: Listings are checked automatically and by admins. Items that violate these rules may be rejected or held for review.
policy.rules.s4_body: If you agree to buy or sell, follow through in good faith. Repeated no-shows, ghosting, or abusive canceling may result in restrictions on your account.
policy.rules.s5_li_1: Peer-to-peer payments (cash, bank transfer, etc.) are between you and the other party—meet in person when possible.
policy.rules.s5_li_2: Do not send money before seeing the item unless you fully trust the other user.
policy.rules.s5_li_3: Never share passwords, verification codes, or student portal credentials.
policy.rules.s5_li_4: CampusMarket Stripe payments are only for promotions and donations, not for ordinary used-item sales between students.
policy.rules.s6_body: Keep negotiations on CampusMarket when possible. Do not spam users or send unsolicited commercial messages unrelated to a listing.
policy.rules.s7_body: If you see a suspicious listing or user behavior, use Report. You can also track your reports on My Reports. Admins review reports and may warn, suspend, or remove accounts.
policy.rules.s8_body: New listings may be published immediately or held in pending approval while our systems or admins review them. You will be notified when a listing is approved or needs changes.
policy.rules.s9_body: Paid listing promotions must still follow all community rules. Misleading promoted listings will be removed without refund at our discretion.
policy.rules.s10_body: Contact {support_email} or use the support chat if you are unsure whether something is allowed.
